sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n197" key="a(broxai/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἁβροχαίτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n197.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἁβροκόμης</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Anacreont.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">41.8</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
